verses.text: Vanglian Topa in hih bangin ci hi: “En un, mi kiphasak khempeuh leh migilo khempeuh, a zung a hiang cih omloin buhtu bangin a kattum ding hun hong tung ding hi. Tua ni ciangin khat zong suakta loin a vekpi-in kangtum khin ding uh hi

Ahi zongin ka thu a hong mang note tungah dikna ni hong taang ding a, tua in nizang bangin note tungah cidamna hong tun' ding hi. Bawng khumna panin a kikhah bawngnote bangin suakta-in nuam na sa ding uh hi
Keimah in na kong sep ni ciangin note in migilote nuaisiahin leivui bangin na tuancil ding uh hi
“Israel mite khempeuh in a zuih dingin Horeb Mual panin ka nasem Moses tungah ka piak ahi, Moses' thukhamte, ngeinate, leh biakna ngeina kipte khempeuh limtakin phawk un
“Ahi zongin tua a lauhuai lian mahmah Topa' ni hong tun' ma-in note kiangah kamsang Elijah kong paisak ding hi
Amah in pate leh tate lemtuahin a kilemsak kik ding hi. Tua bang hi kei leh keimah hong pai-in na gam khempeuh uh ka susiagawp ding hi,” ci hi, a ci hi.
